text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 
92 
OT_PHYSN_NPI 
LABEL: 
Claim Other Physician NPI Number 
DESCRIPTION: On an institutional claim or encounter record, the National Provider Identifier (NPI) number assigned 
to uniquely identify the other physician associated with the institutional claim. 
SHORT NAME: OT_PHYSN_NPI 
LONG NAME: OT_PHYSN_NPI 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs)
